title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Adobe India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Adobe India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
